lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me where I can find the Phoenix Gang?

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: Sh sh sh, not so loud! You don't want to get me in trouble!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So DO you know where they are?

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: I may do.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: But I don't want to get into trouble for revealing their hideout.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: Of course, if I was, say 20 gold coins richer I may happen to be more inclined to take that sort of risk...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay. Have 20 gold coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh....oops. My mistake. I don't have 20 coins. Silly me.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: Ok, to get to the gang hideout, enter Varrock through the south gate. Then, if you take the first turning east, somewhere along there is an alleyway to the south. The door at the end of there is the entrance to the Phoenix

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: Gang. They're operating there under the name of the VTAM Corporation. Be careful. The Phoenixes ain't the types to be messed about.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No. I don't like things like bribery.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: Heh. If you wanna deal with the Phoenix Gang they're involved in much worse than a bit of bribery.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes. I'd like to be 20 gold coins richer too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you sell me some furs?

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: Yeah, sure. They're 20 gold coins each.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, OK, here you go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear, I don't have enough money!

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: Well, my best price is 18 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: OK, here you go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear, I don't have that either.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: Well, I can't go any cheaper than that mate. I've got a family to feed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh well, never mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I'll leave it.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: It's your loss mate.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: 20 gold coins? That's an outrage!

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: Well, I can't go any cheaper than that mate. I have a family to feed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello! I am in search of a quest.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: Sorry kiddo, I'm a fur trader not a damsel in distress.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you like to buy my grey wolf fur?

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: GREY WOLF FUR??? NOW you're talking!

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: Grey wolf fur is something of a desirable item to me.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: I'll take all you have for 120 gold pieces per fur, does that sound fair?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yep, that sounds fine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No! I almost got my throat torn out by a wolf to get this!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you sure? You don't see quality furs like this too often.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: Mmm, let me have another look.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: That is a really fine piece of fur. Tell you what, I'll give you 150 gold pieces for it.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: Those are really fine pieces of fur. Tell you what, I'll give you 150 gold pieces each for them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Now that's more like it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you like to buy my fur?

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: Let's have a look at it.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: It's not in the best condition. I guess I could give you 12 coins for it.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: It's not in the best condition. I guess I could give you 12 coins for each one.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: It's not in the best of condition. I guess I could give you 12 coins for it.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: It's not in the best of condition. I guess I could give you 12 coins for each one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, that'll do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I'll keep hold of it actually!

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: Oh ok. Didn't want it anyway!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you sure? You don't see quality furs like this too often.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: Mmm, let me have another look.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: That is a really fine piece of fur. Tell you what, I'll give you 20 gold pieces for it.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: Those are really fine pieces of fur. Tell you what, I'll give you 20 gold pieces each for them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Now that's more like it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: Wrong! Try again.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: Correct.

lines.speaker: Baraek
lines.text: I must ask you something...
